title: AC Roofing Solutions Inc
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"John Donaldson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1J-kZa6gZCjkU1WwVpJO9kSWjIrVf830UcDAsT1pN40QjrA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Neil responded promptly in the middle of his busiest season with the storm damage. He came out to my house to inspect/locate the leak 1 day after reaching out to him. His customer care and service are beyond great! Would 10/10 recommend anyone reaching out to him for any of your roofing needs! Thanks so much for your heart and your help sir! You are a blessing to our community!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Edie Marsh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyiemh-I-X2FsYZs2S9JR079mSS7Q9eb27wDveT27UNXNjcA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow, I am absolutely blown away by the incredible service I received from Neil at AC Roofing Solutions! From the very first call, Neil was exceptionally punctual and got back to me lightning fast. I was initially concerned that I might need a full roof replacement, but Neil came out, thoroughly inspected everything, and gave me the fantastic news that it only needed a simple repair. What truly impressed me was that Neil had actually installed the roof a couple of years ago before we even purchased the house. Without hesitation, he offered to take care of the repair completely free of charge! You just don’t find that kind of integrity and commitment very often. Neil is the epitome of a professional and an honorable man. He runs a truly reliable business, and I have complete trust in his expertise and his word. If you’re looking for a roofer who is honest, dependable, and stands behind their work, look no further than Neil with AC Roofing Solutions. I would recommend him wholeheartedly, any day of the week!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgTneIXDsvHkmjbiVOymTAZLs4doiUJh0egpKCeUbwfR3yvw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Superb customer service. Had a leak on my roof from a recent hail storm. Neil and his crew got on it in under 24 hours of my initial call. They got my roof patched up and sealed until we get through hail season. I will most definitely be going with AC roofing Solutions once I open my claim on my roof for repairs. Amazing work guys, can’t thank you enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Al Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqTjpsaVVCxNaIVEcbfQ56KM4tKj7tBvHtVrDnb5IL8Y06BY0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My Wife and I were very happy with how fast Neil from Ark City Roofing respond.  Every time we would call we would receive a quick response.  Neil (Ark City Roofing) stands by their work.  They usually get the work done in a day, and are very reasonably priced.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bailee Palmer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGyrfgb_ePZzZ6xpcKSuXPH-cHnbANxoQyiBRwfM2f2jJcJA1f=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband was out of town for work while I was home with our two little ones and the worst happened! A light fixture in our front hallway started leaking water and our A/C and wifi were out because of the power needing to be off! AC roofing came over right away and fixed our issue so fast I barely even had time to express how thankful we were. This company goes above and beyond for their customers and I cannot even express how grateful I am!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mairi Brainard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLk5wUKnMfIsQPwJeKfopIXiOIjsm6H5ZLRIAObJoxbYi7nKA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These guys are the BEST. After having our new roofing project abandoned by a Wichita company we were left in a bad position. After these latest super storms the job officially began actively leaking into the living area of our home. We called everyone in the area to try to get some assistance putting up a tarp on the rake where the water was getting under the shingles.

AC Roofing was not only the only local company who got back to us quickly, but didn't try to price gouge us and were willing to come take a look same day. They came up with a MUCH better solution than the tarp I had planned, custom making a drip edge for the area AND, noticing some issues with our upper windows, even offered to scrape up the old and lay down a new bread of caulk . They were friendly, professional, and very efficient. I can't quite explain what a relief it was to deal with a great company like this after our horrible experience with the previous company who ruined the job and ran off with our money.

I highly recommend at least calling and talking to AC Roofing if you have roof issues. They are the type of company that we need more of -- family owned, local, with excellent service and a high standard of work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"TommynChristine Khuesy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhwyzTTszCYxEEAOutg8d7zESwhBQ0xMTmdMFKmAb7k2VeXg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My mom is very pleased with the work Neil and his crew did! She loves the color and is stress free now that her roof is completed! Neil is so friendly and easy to work with! We appreciate your services!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Czaplinski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjPEyia9WuCfzUk1mzCinFddltK9EE7gWhM0oOZR4JS2t-hA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"AC Roofing Solutions went above and beyond in dealing with a hail storm insurance claim on my roof. Neil was very responsive, professional and knowledgeable with estimates and material options. We went with an upgrade shingle that will save us on our premium and provide better protection. The crew was exceptionally fast and efficient with tear off, install and clean up.The new roof more than met my expectations and I will certainly use his company again.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Dale Larson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTt5UdzzORB0txdTp9PtlTSjlm_xY8Gauqevxdb0WD4Z5kGq5q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Crown Roofing & Solar absolutely saved us during a nightmare insurance situation. Our storm damage roof repair claim was first denied, then only partially approved, and we were terrified we’d have to take out a HELOC just to fix the roof. With young kids and tight finances, it felt hopeless.

Justin stepped in and changed everything. His knowledge of storm damage, roof repair, and the insurance process is on another level. He guided us through months of dealing with multiple adjusters, told us exactly when to call the insurance company to keep the claim moving, and fought for us harder than anyone else would have. Because of his persistence, what started as a small roof repair turned into a fully approved roof replacement — and he even helped us recover the out-of-pocket expenses we spent cleaning up tree debris ourselves.

Crown Roofing & Solar turned a terrifying situation into a complete success story. If you need a trustworthy roofing contractor who understands insurance claims, hail damage, roof repairs, and how to actually get them approved, this is the company to call. We’re beyond grateful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChsWyLT0qewI1Z6GU2EUw2&fid=0x0:0x9fa6fb5e4b3fabfa"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"Richard Stange","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_wiUoHdfjEX59vDhuZftbeHEU58-dkKbv4ogU0jwwjqwbJVdvfA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a problem with my insurance they didn’t wanna pay for my whole roof. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kevin Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJoCYQ7GHWgWDghHa1mRDaIKJSgoy93FcOf9PkqfXVE6NO5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Worked with Cole through the whole process. He showed up asking to look at my roof, free of charge and told me he could for sure get me a new roof. I was extremely skeptical as I've heard that you never use your insurance because it will just go up. Finally, several months later, Cole reached back out to me as he had done a few more times. My wife and I decided to go for it. Not only did I get a new roof, new gutters, attic fans replaced, skylight revealed and the water damage inside from the skylight completely fixed, but I zero stress about it all. The project managers were great here at the house, staying in communication throughout the project. All I was out of pocket was my deductible. Easiest and best house decision I've made.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9QcKZXv5CX9Wd9IzzA5q-&fid=0x0:0xbce395d6cdc3c422"],"When":"2025-9-11"},{"Name":"Kay Gerety","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcwzkczzN54jvQOE4FbL8rQd0Y3oRFjWtWxZZqUKMczeaHVg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cole has been a lifesaver for me! Last night I was going to bed and I walked around my bed to turn down and I noticed the floor was wet. I looked up and my ceiling in the bedroom was leaking really bad. I called Cole and left him a message and he called me right back. We have been in contact for a couple of years because of all the great work he did in our neighborhood. I was blessed not to need a roof replacement but he has kept a good check on me. Cole and Caleb were here this morning already and have placed tarps where shingles have blown off. They did this in the pouring rain. He is also going to send sheetrock workers to replace my ceiling and will permanently repair the roof when the rain stops. I have recommended him to my friends, and they have been absolutely thrilled with his work ethic and the professionalism he shows with every job! Such an incredible and trustworthy man who stands behind everything he is part of. He will always have my business!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAB7X3t6bY_My_wrNfSR9oR&fid=0x0:0xbce395d6cdc3c422"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Lisa Wilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0FbV1yRfpwDQDrRrpnT5OE94MolXJyrVk5Klzvrl8CsN2nw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had to get our roof replaced at our Oklahoma residence last year. We were extremely impressed and pleased with Peak Performance Roofing. They had already replaced several in our neighborhood in Oklahoma. Always professional, respectful, keeping job site clean, aware of protecting your property (like covering the immediate surrounding of the house), using magnets to locate nails in the yard, and amazingly knocked the job out in one day and exceeding our expectations.

With the other upgrades we have done at Summit Ridge, Joplin, MO home we felt it would be wise to have our roof checked as well. Because of the tornado/storm in April and upon inspecting the roof, Cole immediately called Dale and said, “the roof in Joplin is worse than the one was in Oklahoma.” We jumped on it to get the job scheduled within a quick timeframe. Again, they exceeded our expectations with all the professionalism as before including clean job site and even covered the pool for extra protection. This also included our pool house and gutters.

The next step is having Peak Performance guttering team replace all the gutters to complete the new roof project.

All in all, we would encourage you to contact Cole and schedule a FREE roof inspection.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAljJ54e4y8dmelG7VUp6ZP&fid=0x0:0xbce395d6cdc3c422"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Tate Freeman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjjfA8DJK8Y6q_T1CBnuXJesriF-F91nEMRmQW_SuFKzyxObw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"4/2023 Cole was great through the sales process. After we found a lot more damage and increased the project scope I was having trouble keeping the numbers straight, (I had to borrow money). When I asked for invoicing Cole started freaking out, I didn’t get the numbers I needed until the owner got involved. The project was kinda downhill from there. Now 2.5 years later I’m getting bids to clean up the fascia repairs they made and don’t have the funds to address the front side drooping created during the roof replacement process. They knocked a hole in my siding (it was indeed old wood siding) but then just left it, said there was nothing they could do. Getting quotes for that too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBB-z3wfxLUKchVgRR7Eij4&fid=0x0:0xbce395d6cdc3c422"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"SJ Gaither","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1jzLa1pmxM_P-Zux7aJjRWMD3uNi8HTTb6WHUESoj3QnaSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Peak Performance Roofing and Construction was excellent to work with from start to finish. My mom had her roof replaced by Cole, and after seeing her experience, she highly recommended him to me. When I started the insurance claims process, the first adjuster denied my claim, even though many homes in my neighborhood had already been approved for new roofs. Cole didn’t just walk away; he took the time to guide me through the appeal process, explained what to expect, and advocated for me every step of the way.

Not only did he take the time to explain the damage our twenty year old roof had, but he took the time to explain how the insurance process works (fyi, it doesn’t when your roof is that old!) and he got on the roof and tarped the damage before he left. He sent us a fair estimate for the roof replacement and then left us alone while we waited until later in the summer to pull the trigger. The roofing crew came out on schedule and did the whole job in one day and left no evidence that they had ever been here (except for the sign at the road). Very happy with the job. I also want to give a extra shout out to terrel you went above and behind and we thank you for that.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZMnvl8Xx1g5RW7PyyuW6l&fid=0x0:0x7354455c74d41ec9"],"When":"2025-7-9"},{"Name":"Dave Spain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWk33tzHCc_-Z-nquY5JVbyCac3B809JxSQvqxflWSqJZqe6YB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After having some hail damage on our roof, we began the search for a company to do the removal and replacement.

Dan and the crew arrived early and really got after it. Systematic removal and clean up and a very systematic reinstall, with the ventilation issues addressed in clean and reasonable manner. Dan communicated very well and our approval was sought for each and every step.

We highly recommend Rick, his crew and John Minter Construction to everyone looking for a new roof.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elisa C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFtwP7uYCWyPXvqVi-hSeaUiTlyTNc_SngCTZhSzTlDCPlWO4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rick and his crew were wonderful. Rick and his crew were '5-star' terrific to work with. Timely communications, prompt, and cleaned up/hauled off debris. They ended up having to do more work than expected, due to hidden rotten wood that was uncovered in the roofing process (we have a 1910 historic home). Rick's crew not only put a beautiful roof on, they competently and quickly repaired the damaged wood and built/installed new fascia boards! Treat these guys well! They're working very hard and take a lot of pride in their work. and did not let go until all aspects were completed.
Ask for him when you need a new roof.
James made sure the crew got the work done,
and Hailee at the office took care of that end.
Our roof was full replacement approved by insurance,
which Rhoden Roofing to care of.
Our only expense was the deductible,
so Rhoden completed their mission professionally.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Greg Gossett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKTrLNRCjvuld3HucC_h9HIg_LosgdCbxbTPbLeKxsuzj6iOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I were told 'Rhoden Roofing' was the best company to contact for roofing repairs, which our house was in need of. I contacted their office regarding our roof situation and soon after my initial call to them, James (one of Rhoden Roofing's project coordinator's) came over to our house and thoroughly inspected our roof. He took several pictures and then showed us what was taking place with the roof and explained to us his recommendation on taking care of the problem. James was very professional, kind, and knowledgeable, when it comes to taking care of roofs.
Without hesitation, we agreed to his recommendations and soon the work was done and completed. We are very happy with our decision to hire 'Rhoden Roofing'.
We also appreciated how kind the entire staff was with us.
Their attention to customer satisfaction is excellent. They welcomed our calls and stayed in contact with us from the beginning of the project, until the end. I highly recommend using 'Rhoden Roofing' for all roofing needs.
A very happy customer","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Roxanne Beaver","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsOJGDYNSqGrIbblut7k0PfQRsMr84pEtjSFZmTeBW37N5fg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Carson was great to work with. He was friendly, professional, and knowledgeable. He inspected my roof leak, described how the repair would be made, and gave me what I thought was a fair estimate on the cost of repairs. A rafter needed to be replaced as part of the repair and Carson gave me the name of a reputable framer to do that work. Angel and another worker did my repair. Angel seemed be very experienced and worked in an efficient manner. Angel and his coworker were able to complete the work in just 6-7 hours.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nick Dieker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_5-wFg5dgBRC9OE6R4VUFoqfSAphZ60f-SiW4e3MyYncASw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Overall great experience!
From the beginning, Chris went above and beyond to help me navigate the process. He was kind, knowledgeable, and professional.
Amanda and the claims team did a fantastic job advocating on my behalf for the necessary work to be covered by my insurance. Haylee in the office is super kind and compassionate, a very easy person to get along with.

Noah and the crew worked diligently, and did a wonderful job cleaning up after themselves. The roof looks amazing. I was pleasantly surprised at how well the executed the small details. For example, painting the plumbing vent pipes to match? I was not expecting that at all, but what a difference that small detail makes in the overall appearance. I am very pleased.

Even Eric, who was the last onsite picking up the dump trailer, did a second magnet sweep to double check for any nails hiding in the grass. Very thorough job. Like a said before, they executed the small things well.

Everyone I interacted with from Rhoden Roofing was polite, friendly, and professional. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"The Deported Mule","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLymdJY0cecRPdz98_xCq7QDUNm-yhdmrmckabP5ObbANy7Pw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When it comes to something as critical as literally the roof over your head, I wanted the best with no compromise. Rhoden did not disappoint. The whole process from start to finish was extremely smooth and easy to understand. Everyone on their team was very professional. The installers took great care of protecting my yard and flower beds and after they left it was like no one was there.

10/10 Highly recommend","Images":null,"When":""}]

Because of their time-stamped, thorough documentation and expert handling of our large loss claim, we were able to secure more than a 1,000% increase in the final outcome compared to the original offer. We truly could not have achieved this without their guidance and persistence.

Work is now underway, and everything has been handled with care and professionalism. We’re completely satisfied with the process so far and plan to leave another review once the project is complete.

If you're dealing with a complicated insurance claim, we highly recommend reaching out to Daniel and his team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JA McClure","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImNuXQgRlKNd3u_XVfwKjT4n1C7Vd7y4WzGAqfM4M8KH0kEQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jonathon at American Commercial Roofing completed a complimentary roof inspection on my home after several hail storms.  He took many pictures to show me the condition, and after his inspection, shared all the information with me. Both quality and efficiency were emphasized in their workmanship as the roof and gutter replacements were professionally installed within two working days. I felt comfortable sharing feedback on a few minor cosmetic concerns and those were addressed promptly without issue. I’d happily look to Weddle again for roofing and guttering needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alison Cavanagh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOEwl-gTDEtUvmKpYnrBVZAvAEZ6H7nSzRLTSETBJuRblapjW8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We purchased a home with solar panels about six months ago, and during the ownership transfer with the power company, our system somehow came off the grid. We spent months trying to resolve the issue — speaking with the power company multiple times and even hiring other solar companies and an electrician. Each time we were told it appeared to be a meter issue owned by the power company, while the power company insisted it wasn’t on their end.

I finally called Weddle & Sons, and they were fantastic. They came out promptly to inspect our system and agreed it likely pointed to the power company — but instead of stopping there, they were willing to continue troubleshooting after ruling everything else out. They personally contacted the power company and arranged for someone to come out the very next morning. Within a day, we were back on the grid!

This isn’t my first great experience with Weddle & Sons — we’ve used them for roofing in the past and were equally impressed. They are professional, responsive, and truly advocate for their customers. They will absolutely be my first call for solar (and roofing!) moving forward.

Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pam Whitson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrkLQZL7dTViIyKvfUozcJ69pYEBnaZzB6tLC0I-Qqw3fMRVc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We've worked with Weddle & Sons on multiple projects and they've consistently exceeded our expectations. [{"Name":"Joshua Sheefel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1vrN31D5jiSxyH5G_hhsKpsH4CH7v6eqbWlpfcu2FPuAUEw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I can’t get their attention when I’m trying to give them my money I can’t imagine what a hassle a warranty would be once they have my money!
Scheduled an inspection for an estimate last Saturday. I set time aside and waited at home with my lil girl. The gentleman was punctual but that’s it. I explained to him I’d like a complete tear off of my existing roof and replace with a Steele roof. Along with a new gutter system. I’m getting quotes from 3 companies before buying. Unlike the other 2 he never set foot on my roof. He snapped a few pictures from the ground. Then told me his app takes about 25 minutes to generate a quote and he would email it to me. We did discuss shingles and Steele briefly. His non pushy approach was a bit refreshing when he left but it’s now Tuesday night and I haven’t heard anything back. I called today and informed the woman answering the phone I haven’t heard a word about it and she said to check my email she would send a message and make sure I got the estimate.

[{"Name":"Paul Homan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnv2SN8o7rIVKU1RIBtI2kWN_TsfdZEq32n4O0057I5osXEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the pleasure to check in multiple times on the progress of installing exterior doors, windows, siding and guttering. The guttering guys were on site and gone before I ever got a chance to meet them.

April was on site multiple times to ensure proper progress on the project. Ricardo did an excellent job with the crew making sure that all the details were taken care of. I had multiple opportunities to work with both April and Ricardo! They made changes when necessary everything was able to be Taken care of on a very timely basis!

I am happy to provide written or verbal references If anyone has questions! I do remodel work myself, and I am working on the interior of the house at 205 College in Winfield!

I actually worked on the carport while they were putting Siding up, then they worked behind me while I was putting new support beams up under the carport.

A huge thank you to both April and Ricardo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBtpY-poJYnGUWMzIXgqE7C&fid=0x0:0x9e385d9307c31644"],"When":"2025-8-15"},{"Name":"Reese Voth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk04x7PJv00aOfJJCTzjjBQbg3XmuYMvymzCguA3kdAHARbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Happy with the whole process!
Jonny Paine helped explain our options after confirming hail damage and answered all of my questions. We have a relatively small roof and they were able to remove the old roof and be done with everything before noon. They also cleaned up the area really well, which is appreciated with our young kids.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J&H Holloway","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6EkEIy15MHrZGOZMqg2agelrf-taOdUsKSyUnvdkUgd3_lA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The short story: April is AWESOME, and A-R Roofing has been fabulous throughout the whole process. If you’re looking for a contractor to replace your roof, or other various exterior projects, look no further!

The long story: When we knew we needed a new roof, as well as a few other things, I called three companies, including A-R Roofing. The other companies pushed to see my insurance claim estimate. I suspect they were just going to say, “Ok, we’ll fix what they say is damaged for the amount they’re paying.” I knew the insurance adjuster had missed some things, and I just wanted someone that knew what they were doing to help us make sure the insurance covered everything they should.

A-R Roofing sent April out to look at our house. She impressed us from the first meeting. She spent a good amount of time looking our house over for weather related damage that the insurance should cover. She showed us what she found, and was honest about what was weather related and what wasn’t (and would not be covered by the insurance). She never once asked to see our insurance paperwork. It was obvious she knew what to look for, and she was willing to spend time to do a thorough job helping us.

We then shared our estimate with her and she began working with us on filing the insurance supplements to cover all the damage to our house. She even helped us file supplements for things we weren’t planning on having A-R Roofing do for us. Insurance was being slow, but she kept in touch and helped where she could.

Then the September 3rd hail storm hit, and there was a lot more damage to our house. We ended up having to file a second claim, and go through the process of waiting for an adjuster to come and for the insurance to do their thing. Once everything finally came through, April helped us again to make sure the insurance covered everything they should, and submitted the forms we needed to file for supplements.

When everything was finally approved, she quickly got the crews out to do our work. Both crews were respectful, and did a great job quickly and efficiently! They thoroughly cleaned up after themselves as well. We are very happy with the work they did!

Again, April has been awesome throughout this whole process. We feel very blessed to have had her helping us, and she feels like a friend to our family now. She never made us feel like a bother, and was always willing to help. She went above and beyond what most would likely do!

Everyone we have dealt with from A-R Roofing has been great, from the lady that answered the phone when we first called, to the crews that actually did the work. We would enthusiastically recommend them to anyone that needs work done on their house!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rose Hill Bible Church","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVC34NTmocNDB76h9LJtBUWi-9CwA_AlDTeB4GNd1c2L6JmYos=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our Church needed to be completely re-roofed following a hail storm. Worked with Daniel Hewitt at A&R Roofing. He was professional and attentive. They got the job done well and for a fair price! We have recommended them to others.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cathy Comley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKI0nSQxX_wOUBX9hJrTh5vphSG1cxVsh0lxNUJu1izjysg_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A-R Roofing did an awesome job on replacing our roof after a summer hail storm.  Daniel Hewitt was our service representative that worked tirelessly with our insurance company to make our roof replacement a possibility. We highly recommend A-R Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lauren Anderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl27BDXly9f4WGzEtSl_GP1d6GwPBjBcYEoNp78JqnoQQM4Ek=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"AR Roofing was absolutely amazing to work with, especially Nick Layton! He answered every question I had and kept me informed every step of the way — from documents and payments to progress updates. He even stopped by multiple times during installation to check in!

The crew was wonderful as well — kind, respectful of my home, property, and animals, and even took the time to entertain my curious 3-year-old who wanted to see what was going on. They worked hard, cleaned up beautifully, and turned what was supposed to be a two-day project into a one-day completion.

Nick and the entire AR Roofing team were incredible, and I highly recommend them to anyone needing roofing work done!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathleen Navarro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKA3K7rRi6P65MYLijv8-vRrIvWfMsfiXe0ki5M-ExvAkYnQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had metal siding put on by AR Roofing in October 2025 and April was wonderful on communication flow throughout our project from beginning to end. We had Aden as our onsite project manager who kept me informed throughout the installation and the guys manually putting up the siding were kind, quick and cleaned up each night before they left. We are very happy with the work AR Roof team did, would definitely recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stan Yost","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9rxPW5JZBsIsnJ4SiOcBRR7bT9uGIwiTQyprKmZ8_NVqaqA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just had my roof replaced due to storm damage. Alonso and his crew were great, they were fast and did a excellent job. They had to replace some decking due to water damage, because the last company did a bad job. Steve did a great job getting the installation and repairs all organized. I will most definitely use them in the future and will recommend to family and friends.
Stan","Images":null,"When":""}]

Thank you guys for all you did.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Megan Kantor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgSasMGj_xGV2K8TWhSFQxjL3Q45Xi9_GEpfH9G66qIg8rMFI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"McGee Roofing replaced our roof in our old farm house (which was EXTREMELY in need) and also replaced our gutters. We had the run around from numerous other local roofers who would never show up or quoted undoable costs that made us feel extremely discouraged. Frank showed up the same day we called him to give an initial estimate. We were transparent of we know the roof was bad, but our budget was limited as we were not able to go through insurance. He worked with us to get the quote in a more comfortable spot for us and his roofing crew was out a couple days later. They had the tear off and replacement done in one day. They were so fast, efficient, and our property was cleaner than how it was when they arrived! The installation of the gutters was a few days later and had the same experience with that crew. Frank was firm that he wanted to come out and verify the work his team had done before we paid a dime. When he came and gave his approval the total was even lower than what we were originally quoted! We will absolutely be using McGee Roofing for any work needed in the future. And the fact that they stand behind their roofs and gutters for 5 years makes me sleep better at night. The job appears to be done perfectly, but to have that much confidence in their work says a lot! Frank was extremely kind, educating, and I truly felt like he had our best interest in mind. He was even able to determine the reason we were having water issues in our basement that the prior owner never disclosed and solved the issue for us. Our little farm house is now truly able to be the safe and dry home we wanted so badly!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aaron Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKkubgPNuMZOUMOvDGYhv58LJBZh9BYKEa-KUu1Ey0nXcw06A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The roof and gutters turned out perfect!! open_hours: {"Friday":["8 AM–5 PM"],"Monday":["8 AM–5 PM"],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["8 AM–5 PM"],"Tuesday":["8 AM–5 PM"],"Wednesday":["8 AM–5 PM"]}
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Subhabrata Banerjee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoiUkeFk2IPpgZor5rVo6MLeUHmQWbOJohOQ5efkb45egdW2Hg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our roof was damaged during last year’s hailstorm, and our insurance company approved coverage for the replacement cost. I contacted multiple contractors for quotes and was surprised by the level of dishonesty I encountered. Many refused to provide a quote without first seeing the insurance estimate, clearly intending to match it rather than offer a fair, upfront price. Out of nearly ten contractors, only two provided honest quotes without requesting my insurance information. Of these two contractors, I ultimately chose to work with Andrew from Partridge Roofing Services. It was a pleasure working with him—he responded promptly to my questions, offered several options for different classes of shingles, and provided a very reasonable quote that was lower than the other contractor’s. My insurance company allowed only six months to complete the work, and Andrew was able to prioritize the project and finish it on time. I am extremely satisfied with the workmanship, and the new roof looks great. I highly recommend Partridge Roofing Services for their honesty, fair practices, and quality of work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shawn Telford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIr9UYcaum5cpUkP8-31Usuqmu4QrEi8p-fiIEeFUPJvIlgqA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Partridge Roofing did a wonderful job on our roof and gutters. Through all of it, Joe and Paul were so helpful, patient, and understanding with us and the sellers.  We fought to keep them as the roofers through the contract extension of the sale because they run such an upstanding and honest business and we have been so impressed with them from the very beginning when they came to quote the job.  Their team works well together and they did beautiful work.  We also really appreciated how they worked to find a better solution for our attic venting.  We are very happy with our new roof!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathy Lindahl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJpWftBbnyg2Us4pQg-TZTqml30lzGSSZUMZ3101zBwICTrdxo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My roof had hail damage from this last storm, and I had Partridge Roofing put on a new roof. Highly recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Vinduska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5Bwuld1bVsD-EMdKWRCwcbF0PLGJHY1HlQRvd6wUhXJs5Dw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I could not be more pleased with the roofing services that we received from Partridge Roofing Services! The crew that came to complete the work was a joy to have on the job site.  They completed the project in a very timely manner and the work was wonderfully done!  If you need roofing services, look no further, this is the company to hire!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yvonne Powell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKVdkXd1rNcA9tLMWxnYzi2skvnVKeVNLaE0wqiywU5fxr8ksj3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a pleasure it was doing business with Partridge Roofing Services. When the roof got hailed out in 2019, we decided to use Gottschalk Roofing. This family owned business has been in business since the 1950’s. Their crew did an excellent job removing the old roof and replacing it with a better quality hail-resistant roof that Jim Gottschalk recommended. Thank you Jim and everyone at Gottschalk!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Phillip Jennings","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsOdv2D8VWcETFEKsVYQ-YViYX48KCcOSLlfrLtqGsP-CTjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gottschalk Brothers roofing has been in business since before I was born, my parents always called Gottschalk Brothers roofing for  any roof that was ever put on any of their homes since this company was formed. myself and all of my siblings have continued tradition of calling Gottschalk Brothers for all of our own homes.  I don't trust any other company.  Jim Gottschalk will show up when promised and give a complete and fair bid for work, and will work with your insurance company getting the information needed to complete the process of getting the job done.   I had a new roof put on a rental property in February 2023 and again on my own home in August of 2023, both times it was a home and  two detached garages.  Both times communication was priority, I knew with plenty of advanced notice when the crew would be on the jobsite and the jobs were done and complete with in one day , attention was paid to my landscaping and flowers so they would not be damaged and all debris was removed the same day and the jobsite was left clean. All of the roofs on my properties look awesome!  The certificate was sent to the insurance company the next day so the insurance company would release any remaining funds to me.  I assure any home owner or business owner that should they choose Gottschalk Brothers roofing for hire, that they will get the highest quality workmanship, with professional and detailed personal communication from start to finish of the project.  In my personal opinion there is no other roofing company in our area worth calling except Gottschalk Brothers roofing, and you will feel the same if you contact them for your roofing needs. [{"Name":"Ron&Connie Dunyon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpPaLGKZBE4YWNJF-_l8A4ZpzA4ko02Mo1u-n2PpLJCqGPek7V=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They have always treated me well. They do good work!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Randy Daubert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8Z1vnYhM01_iU2bfldlV77F-XZ-F6hp2apyTNbBGwjDwU0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had them replace the gutters on my house and the installers were great and so were the gals at the office, and the guy that came out and gave me the estimate.  They did some roofing and siding work on my house 3 years ago and I was equally impressed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Fischer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2hMkTj-4mHmIp2jKFdqd2o0KcLkNiGBEM_mbn7KPSRFiEqw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This is a continuation of my wife's review. We hit our character limit.

Pros:
1)Got on my job quickly. I was expecting a longer wait.
2)Justin was willing to get on the roof and let us know about the insurance claim.
3)The siding crew did a very good job on the siding, clean lines and matches the existing house in most spots.

Cons:
1)Not the roof valleys we wanted.
2)Did not install roof vents as asked and still tried to charge for them.
3)Did not use the materials I asked for in construction.
4)Justin seemed very disconnected once the sale was made. I never heard from him first asking how I was liking it. All of our communications were me informing him of issues.
5)There was times when they would tell me they would be out Monday, and I may not see them till Friday without any explanation. Sometimes longer. I would go 2 weeks without a word or sight of them.
6)All of the crews liked to leave behind trash for  me to pick up. Wrappers from the shingles, boxes from the gutter/siding crew, screws all around. The construction crew left behind a 10” table saw blade on the ground for my 2 year old to find. Overall, very messy workers.
7)I feel like there is very little communication between management and work crew. I would tell Justin about an issue, he would say OK. Then when a crew showed up, they wouldn’t know what the issue was.
8)There was very little English spoken by the roofing crew, even the lead who, every time I looked over, was sitting in his truck. I don’t know why I should have had to pay for him to be there. Very hard to communicate.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristy Fischer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXLTZuIxoYxqW2v8DWXOy8nKh8ArE8euI87urpnB9RQOOztw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I really wish there was an option for 2.5 stars, because that is really how I feel about the job H&H did for me and my family. Not great, but not terrible, very middle of the road and average. I definitely feel that the siding crew did a better job overall than the roofing crew as well. My wife and I were wanting to do a home addition and I have to admit, at first, I was very impressed with Justin and H&H. Justin actually got on our roof, looked it over, and told us it was actually hailed out. You couldn’t tell it by looking, but the adjuster said the same thing. This here saved us about $6,000 in insurance. This really put them on my good side. Day one of the project, tearing off the existing roof. Our existing valleys were done in a woven shingle style and we really liked that look and we asked if we could do the new roof in that style. Crew said no problem. When installed, it was what I believe is called a cut valley, which has a definitive line. This is usually done to save time by the contractor. They never asked if that was what I wanted, it was just done that way. Not really what we wanted, but no way to change it. I brought this up to one of the guys and he just gave me a blank stare. There was also several shingles they had to come and redo due to them coming up. Next issue came with roofing the addition. I had planned to have them install 3 roof vents for me and noticed that when the roof was done, there were no vents. When I asked the crew where they were, I was told that they were not sure how to install in the type of roof I had installed, which was SIPS panels. I was also at home most of that day and not one person asked me about it. This led to me having to purchase a thermostat controlled gable fan. When I received the bill, I was still billed for the vents. If I hadn’t caught that, it would have been and extra $150. Not a lot of money in the grand scheme of things, but if this slipped through, did anything else? Next issue was the connecting of the two rooms. We placed our addition about 2 feet from the existing and were going to stick build over to it. I planned on doing this myself but ran out of time so I asked H&H. I told the foreman that I had 2x6s purchased for this and had them stacked up next to the addition. I wanted 2x6s just mostly for insulation purposes . When I got back home that day, I had one wall installed, with 2x4s they purchased. When I asked one of the crew about it, he said he asked his foreman about the 2x6s I had laying there and the apparently the foreman preferred to use his own. That’s fine, if they would have used the right boards.
They also left about a 1.5”x1.5” hole in the wall below the siding. I had to ask them to fill it. They used spray foam. They also installed/replaced our gutters. There is several spots where down pipes are crooked/out of line. The leaf guards on the gutters look very unclean in several areas. Gutters also seem to slope downhill in a few spots. So, all in all, like I said, I would best describe H&H as average as best. I will probably go elsewhere in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brandon Nimz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9GycEZx3QMZV8tKQ0dwgZFTvpjCdmDOJGfzcYYye3feMAIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In addition to performing the construction work well, H & H spent extra time to make sure that we were happy with the quality of the work and to cover some extras that we had specifically requested in detail. [{"Name":"Shauna Drake","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFr6QpsxXzhvsCQegEU5CzvcLZLzbC9jz_85KgygSTDm2Ii2zI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an excellent experience with this DCS. Even though I live in California and the house needing repairs is in Oklahoma, they made the whole process simple and stress-free from a distance.

Their price was very fair, about $2,000 less than another company I got a quote from. What stood out even more was the honesty. He explained that I didn’t necessarily need to do a full replacement and that patching the roof would be fine, but he never pressured me either way. I really appreciated the fairness and transparency. In the end, I decided to go ahead with the full replacement, and I’m glad I did. They not only did the roof repair, but the facia and trim that had been taken out by a tree.

The work was completed quickly and carefully. The best part was how thoughtful they were in working around my parents and their dog in the backyard. They managed everything smoothly without disrupting them at all.

On top of that, he even helped connect me with a tree service to get a tree taken down before the roof work started. That extra step made things so much easier.

Overall, they were honest, reliable, efficient, and genuinely easy to work with. I would absolutely recommend them to anyone needing roofing work done.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTgBWpcpbu4kIybYGG_94l&fid=0x0:0xad204f9569200bc9"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"Anita Chaney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4wkVB9Crx0Uowcu2DuIC6NqGAHQQJp7SSy0HEW0I2zWlP1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have done business with many companies as I remodeled my home. The quality of the work truly speaks for itself. The crew was professional, punctual, and respectful of the property. It’s rare to find a contractor who combines skill, honesty, and professionalism at this level.

If you’re looking for a roofing company you can trust whether it’s for a repair, replacement, or inspection I highly recommend giving them a call. After all that was finished we slapped a new roof on. Brand new house!!! Boom!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID73O6T2AE&fid=0x0:0xc6cc9aeeeaab2a94"],"When":"2024-8-22"},{"Name":"Charles Boudinot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLcnAR2O-CT99Rh-H42ZDMbL0uVOP2UwXWbqW4o1rMeqrM-ktP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Overall the project went very well. Jeremy was (is) great at communication and that's always half the battle. Every member of his team that worked on our projects were professional, polite and went above and beyond on every detail.

Our interior painters, Joe Don and Martin were fantastic and did a wonderful job. This is the only part of the overall project that went over budget and that was because my wife and I made a change after some of the work had been completed so that was on us.

Our exterior painters were fantastic as well. "T" and his crew worked in extreme heat and at dangerous heights to scrape, tape and paint the exterior of our home. Our home is over 100 years old and is a very tall two story house so this was no walk in the park.

Lastly, the crew that roofed our home was amazing. I'm not sure of the total number of workers that were here each of the two days it took to reroof the home, but it was between 8 and 10. Again, this is a dangerously tall home and with heat over  100° every day. There were 3 layers of shingles that had to be removed. They worked from around 6:30am until 2pm then took a break and got back at it from 5pm to around 8:30pm until the project was completed. The roof was due to hail damage from a recent storm. My wife and I have never filed a homeowners claim in our 33 years of marriage and really didn't know what the process was. Jeremy has been great walking us through that process and working with our insurance company for payment.

Overall it has been a pleasure to work with Jeremy and his wife Jennifer and C & C as a whole. It was just luck that I was able to find C&C in the first place. I had had a couple of really bad experiences with 2 other companies and I was not looking forward to putting our project out for bid again. The thought of starting again made me sick. We were very fortunate that Jeremy and C&C were the company that placed the bid. I know from this point forward my wife and I know who to call for future projects. We have two in the planning stages at this time.

If you are looking for a construction company, give them a call. I can't recommend them enough!

Charles and Billie Boudinot","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICu4ObzjQE&fid=0x0:0xc6cc9aeeeaab2a94"],"When":"2022-7-18"},{"Name":"Mindy Bailey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIv2UsLPJ-EgmYVkmpWZdRf00JBfi7L-wEyCu-UVo4JNiBXyg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had wood rot and some damage around the siding of our chimney. Our roof was no small task. There were three levels of asphalt shingles and original wood shingles from more than 100 years ago. The crew worked so hard to pick up all the debris.

[{"Name":"Mike Anthony","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMwTYBQNyLAEcSSh5ikjwnEWHYeldF10p-jWJtePOkn6gwwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went through the Oklahoma Fortified program and ended up choosing Truest Roofing. To say I'm a perfectionist is an understatement, and I warned Truest Roofing before giving them the job what it would be like working with me. They took on the challenge and did not disappoint. I absolutely love my new fortified roof, and my neighbor is so impressed that he now wants Johnny to come over to discuss replacing his roof. I highly recommend Truest Roofing!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPfRWdrbvYMCZIaS7xKyEx&fid=0x0:0xf1480e0d0887072e"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"misty wakefield","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjjssTjALLlBOomA4EyqJQUIxUwuCSjufsD150wfxW8Q8t7vhP8A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Truest Roofing replaced our almost 20 yr old, three layer, shingle roof with a fortified roof.

State Farm did us dirty several years ago after that ice storm where we didn’t have power for like…2 weeks. And ever since then, we had damage that was never corrected that exacerbated moisture and led to mold growth in our attic. We weren’t aware until almost a year ago when SF sent a letter saying they can’t coverage unless I replace the roof. How convenient when I fought with them a few years before that saying the same thing… 😒.

Posted on social media asking about local contractors because I don’t want one of those big corporate companies to do it. Got so many great referrals, reached out to several. When Jonathan David Pewe came out, did his inspection, gave us feedback, listened to me complain about SF and my current situation and timeline - mentioned the Oklahoma roofing grant. I thought “great! Maybe it’s something we would qualify for”. I kind of drug my feet about researching it, but after a couple of months, I called the phone number for the grant and started asking my questions.  Just general info at that time, one of the things I was told was that you must have a Homestead filed with the current county assessor already in place in order to apply for the current grant period. We’ve owned our house over 14 years and I thought, surely I’d remember having done that. They told me what the timeline was and it had passed for the year so I gave up.

Despite the possibility of not having the grant as an option to help us with this expense, we still had to move forward because I still had to have a roof before the end of the year or risk non-coverage.

Jonathan still met with our State Farm inspector, and went up on the roof with him and pointed out damage that I don’t think they wanted to admit. However, State Farm also casually pointed out they can’t cover certain things because we have mold. I told the agent that we wouldn’t have the mold had they addressed our concerns a few years ago they said too bad, regardless of the cause, it’s not covered in our policy.

They gave us about 1/4 of what we needed to replace the roof and the rest was going to have to be out of pocket. Jonathan gave us various price points and options to try to get it to fit within our budget, which was more than maxed because we had to replace our HVAC just a few months before this.

I finally decided to call Logan County assessor office to start the application process for Homestead and see if there was a way I could bide my time and still be approved for the next year.  to my surprise, relief, and delight the young lady I spoke with informed me we’ve had a Homestead filed since we bought the house. She emailed me the documentation I needed to apply for the grant, and I submitted all of that information and application SAME DAY.

It took about a week and a half to hear back and start the process. And over the next couple of weeks followed the Strengthen Oklahoma grant instruction and direction, submitted documentation, did all of the things I should’ve done almost a year before. The process had several moving pieces and timelines that we had to follow, but they made it very easy and def worthwhile.

Now almost an entire calendar year after we started this process we are at the finish line. Very thankful for Jonathan’s input and sharing word about the roofing grant. Also kind of walking us through the entire process over the last year. He helped me identify reputable contractors to address the mold, even our gutters and our siding that needed to be replaced as well. I didn’t have the money for the whole house, I just needed some of these  repaired. I got other quotes in addition to the contractors he provided, and they were all comparable and reasonably priced across the board.

Still thinking about joining that lawsuit for State Farm. I haven’t fully decided.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCJ91cFhoGrGwFk5qoTHdC1&fid=0x0:0xf1480e0d0887072e"],"When":"2026-2-27"},{"Name":"chassidysmommy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdeq92E_rSer2ngj-hlt6Np_JhSku46EeY3Yc2kWxGLTCWF_vf9g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So easy to work with!  Jonathon helped make the whole process super easy, they showed up when scheduled, and worked until it was done.  It looks so nice it inspired us to take care of a few other neglected areas (like paint, lol).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBM8qgFVXM36OfKAwvVp6nl&fid=0x0:0xf1480e0d0887072e"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"alan manning","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-HhKQZQVWNO76DtSHLR1ZDcJibWJYLPxD5bmRXzWyyLnQKA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Truest recently replaced our roof. The inspection and initial bid process was very professional and low pressure. The salesman explained the process and available options very thoroughly. Once the date and time was scheduled, the Truest crew showed up on time and stripped the old roof quickly and efficiently. I was impressed by the effort to minimize and manage the material that fell in our yard and driveway. The crew then got right on installing the new roof. [{"Name":"Will Gilbrech","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuKPr-bCkA5iGRKSvqajLVWaWy5Lg-N-Zt2YDigdss3rr0BRh4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best things that has ever happened to my business was a 4 Star roofing salesman (Randy) walking into our office unsolicited. In a few minutes Randy politely explained who he was and who he represented and we agreed to let him take a look at our roof.

Unbeknownst to us, a recent hail storm had significantly damaged our roof. Randy quickly discovered this and began to work on a claim with our insurance company. The initial offer from our insurance adjuster was around $15,000. Randy and his team knew that wasn’t enough so they dug in even harder, employing thermal analysis with drones, nail pull strength tests, and more.

After weeks of negotiating with the insurance adjuster, they were able to get our claim to over $100,000. It took substantial time and effort by their back office to achieve this over 6x’ing of our claim. I simply do not believe a small roofing contractor could have achieved it.

After getting approved for the above amount, we agreed on a scope of work and the actual roofing work began. Justin and his team came out and did an amazing job and now for the first time in quite literally almost a hundred years, our building’s roof does not leak.

If you have had roofing damage, don’t waste your time with other companies. 4 Star is the choice.

Thank you 4 Star.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBjYLZCA&fid=0x0:0xf884e4e8897b911f"],"When":"2023-1-25"},{"Name":"Jim Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgqaYlYIQxYBV0TJpPxTyWNolsb0pBd1c8aVo32X3Pm9Ndb50=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great experience with Marcus from 4 Star General Contracting. He was knowledgeable, the pricing was affordable, and I’d definitely recommend them for any roofing work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Damian Velasco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKW5L5ZCvRsrOtuWVAEjGIszKOCHU7jjiJEbCxxkxNrdYsiRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My recent experience with 4 Star Commercial Roofing left me thoroughly impressed and highly satisfied.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Deborah Ball","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaAL57OJGwKiB9NxsaLpoLKtMb1kQxqALsLD5I2FpkqpHFmD4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After the hail storm in September 2025, I needed a full roof and gutter replacement on my home in Newalla, Oklahoma. As an older homeowner, my biggest concern was avoiding the fly-by-night roofing companies that show up after storms and take advantage of people. I wanted someone established, trustworthy, and experienced in Oklahoma. Elliott Roofing has been serving this area for over 40 years, which immediately gave me peace of mind.

From the very first inspection, Matt was professional, patient, and never pushy. He clearly explained the hail damage, walked me through the insurance process with State Farm, met the adjuster, handled all supplements, and ultimately made sure my claim was approved correctly with the full scope covered.

The installation process was smooth from start to finish. Preston, the production scheduler, and Peyton, the project manager, communicated clearly, kept the job site clean, and ensured everything was completed the right way. Amy in the office was also incredibly helpful and kind whenever I had questions.

My home received a full roof replacement using Owens Corning TruDefinition Duration Class 3 shingles, along with upgraded ventilation, ice and water shield protection, new gutters, and a full system warranty. The entire process from inspection to completion took about two months, and the quality of the workmanship truly shows.

What stood out most was the honesty, professionalism, clear communication, and how much Elliott Roofing genuinely cared about doing the job right. I never felt pressured and was supported and informed every step of the way.

If you need roof replacement or storm damage repair in Newalla or anywhere in the Oklahoma City area, I highly recommend Elliott Roofing. They brought me complete peace of mind and delivered a beautiful, high-quality roof that I know will last for years.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Fitz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6Ph522UFmb2xdESP0letiBSRF8AkzE0LazDSuTBA2kQR_Rw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An overdue review! Meant to post this when we had our roof replaced last summer but time got away from me - maybe better in the end. After a year we couldn’t be happier with our decision to go with Elliot’s. Not only was the work pleasant and service great, they helped with color selection of the new roof (a really pain) and our house looks better than before too - we get compliments all the time. Im looking to remodel and I'm definitely considering them.. thank you for all your hard work!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ju Bo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoFVhUJiBNVbeUrob7vmyMFSkcjdoAiXWFQCnni-_LjZwxFJe0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My review of this company is late but I still wanted to do this. I hired Lou to replace my roof. He was a nice person when we first met. But after having to call him several times to get something done correctly he became rude. Not only did they not do a good job but they caused more damage to my home. Oh and while they were working on my roof,  one of his guys decided to lean on my already damaged siding and his hand went through it and he wanted to charge me $2000 to fix it. I said I wasn't paying for it and so he decided to send someone to paint over the damages. Well if that was not enough...
Years later after I had to get my roof again, my new roofers sent me pics of my roof and what I saw was appalling.  First off they did not replace the vents although they were paid to do so. I met Britton from OKC Roofers and he helped us through the insurance process and made everything easy. He communicated everything in detail, walked us through every step of the process and was great to work with. The crew was great as well. They got the work done in one day and everything was cleaned up after the work was done. I will definitely be recommending Britton and OKC Roofers to everyone I know!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDYvqPY3a1TmyqdS8uhmYx8&fid=0x0:0xe32be3fb97d69e91"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Kelsi Mack","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtPh8uVX4Vq6r7BcadUUQEarvTfVEo1Cd5aUl-3yGKMnU7kOSV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just had my second full roof replacement done by OKC Roofers, and Eric Aultz made the whole process smooth and stress-free—again!
A couple of years ago, after some major hail in Edmond, Eric came out, did a thorough drone inspection, explained everything clearly (no pressure sales), and helped us navigate the insurance claim perfectly. The first install was top-notch, held up great through Oklahoma’s crazy weather, and the crew left everything spotless.
When it was time for a complete tear-off and new roof this year (our original was just too old after more storms), I didn’t hesitate to call Eric back. He remembered our home details, walked us through upgraded shingle options that fit our budget and style, coordinated with insurance seamlessly, and got us approved quickly. The production team (shoutout to the crew and project manager) showed up on time, worked efficiently even with some wind, finished ahead of schedule, and took extra care with all the flashing, vents, and cleanup—no nails left in the yard!
The new roof looks amazing, feels solid, and comes with their 25-year leak guarantee, which gives me real peace of mind. Eric’s honesty, knowledge, and follow-through are why we’ve trusted them twice now. If you’re in Edmond or OKC and need roofing (repair, replacement, or storm damage), go with OKC Roofers and ask for Eric Aultz—you won’t be disappointed. Highly recommend!”","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Venturich Consulting Group","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmK_ndvNjwpfiFhfjOVSp-CDPbQPJ_UjjFO1GHoZnE3dCw0b4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best roofing company in the OKC metro—hands down.

OKC Roofers were outstanding from start to finish. Their rep came out promptly and did a thorough, honest assessment of my 5-year-old roof on a Taber-built home after I discovered a massive leak in one of the bedrooms. He didn’t rush, didn’t upsell, and took the time to explain exactly what was going on and what needed to be done.

They immediately sealed all roof vents, carefully checked the entire roof, and made sure everything was secured properly. On top of that, they’re also handling the ceiling replacement from the leak, which is a huge relief—one less thing for me to coordinate.

What really impressed me was the professionalism and knowledge. We had a great conversation about improving attic ventilation, and he explained the Arctic Breeze solar-powered attic ventilator in a way that actually made sense. Im feeling confident enough to move forward with installing it, knowing it’ll help with airflow, efficiency, and long-term roof health.

If you’re looking for a roofing company that is responsive, knowledgeable, honest, and truly cares about doing the job right, OKC Roofers is it. They set the standard for roofing companies in the metro. I wouldn’t call anyone else.

Highly, highly recommend. 💯🏠🔨","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eh Doo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6QPrvgXq4AE2KVBLTl2vtSULJf7J5C05aWRSrv1yOD6gjSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great experience with OKC Roofers! Any concerns I had, they answered with confidence and were ready to exceed my expectations. Thank you so much! If you have any roofing needs, Lakeside is the place to call!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Josh Elrod","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbBNTronZGFZ0ipe4ngDBsrm44YB_iAxkac3K5YvAJLbg5mrU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"On the day the neighbors completed their new roof, a strong wind blew thousands of long, clear plastic strips into my yard. These plastic streamers, approximately three feet in length, infiltrated various areas of my property. They lodged in my air conditioning condenser, obstructing the coils and the fan motor.
I demonstrated to the foreman that approximately 360 degrees of my house required cleanup. However, only the rear portion was addressed. I contacted them the following day to request the pickup, but no one arrived. I called again and was informed that a supervisor would contact me, which never transpired. Approximately a week later, I finally spoke with Tim, who reassured me that the cleanup would be completed.
A worker did arrive and retrieved some of the streamers. I communicated with him through the doorbell camera and he assured me that all the streamers had been removed. Upon returning home, I inspected the work and discovered that this was a falsehood.
My resources revealed that the worker spent more time playing on his phone than he did picking up the debris he had neglected. Despite my explicit guidance and physical demonstration of the areas that needed attention, he failed to complete the task.
As a result, streamers remain in my trees, yard decorations, and now serve as a binding material for my mower, which had already damaged my air conditioning condenser.
I did not receive any roofing services from this company, and I would never recommend their roofing services to anyone.

Last photo is from 6/25/2025","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIzryGRQ&fid=0x0:0x31d6b27549d7e7d6"],"When":"2025-4-9"}]

From the prep to the clean up, everything was perfect! I highly recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Terry H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAUwP7SmD8u4hNW9hlhWebT1Lv7UTi_RCsOowNvslU136tJzuT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What can I say about Josh Daugherty with 777 Roofing & Construction, LLC?  I think the better question is, what can I not say?  I was very much impressed.

On July 10, 2023, Josh dropped by my home and offered a free roof inspection.  I hadn't had my roof repaired since I bought my home in 2017.  And after a few heavy hailstorms that had come in recently, I figured this was as good a time as any to get an inspection.  So, I had Josh come by the next morning to do his thing.  To no surprise, there was hail damage to various sections of the roof, both garage doors, a window screen and glazing bead, as well as the rain gutters.

Now, too be honest, I had not initially planned to go with Josh.  Earlier this year, another roofer had made quite the impression on me.  So, much so, I left him a glowing review.  But for whatever reason, I decided to look for reviews on 777 Roofing.  On Google Reviews, I discovered over 190 reviews with 5-star ratings, consistently over a span of 4 years, but 1 as far back as 9 years.  That's pretty darn impressive.  I then researched the roofer that I'd initially planned to hire.  Nothing less than 5-star ratings, as well, but with only a review count in the mid-20s.  The comparison in experience presented a gap too wide to bridge.  I had to choose a side.  I'm sure you know who I chose.

I contacted my insurance and filed a claim.  Josh was familiar with my assigned adjuster.  They both worked together in harmony and Josh ensured that my claim was approved.  Subsequently, Josh sat down with me to go over the type of roof I wanted - shingles, color, longevity, yada, yada, yada.  You know how it goes.  He also walked me through the process of what to expect from start to finish when the job began, and then put me on the schedule.

On Tuesday, August 29, 2023, early morning, the job began.  It went just as Josh said it would.  There was a lot of noise, hammering, banging, ripping, and trashing, as to be expected, but I wasn't much bothered by that.  The only inconvenience was that the wife and I had to park our cars out on the street while the dumpster and roofing material occupied the driveway.  But on Wednesday, August 30, 2023, before 10:00am, the job was completed, which was so fast, it had not even set in that I'd been inconvenienced.  Next thing I knew, Josh was already outside with his magnetic pickup tool making sure no nails were left behind. We wouldn't want to puncture our tires, or feet for that matter.  Beforehand, Josh said after he performed a cleanup, I shouldn't find more than 2 or 3 nails left behind.  I found only 2, one in the driveway and the other in the garden bed.  All I can say, is my hat's off to Josh for a job well done.  If memory serves, I believe Josh told me he'd earned a degree in criminal justice, but his interest shifted to roofing.  I have no doubt that with his communicative skills, eye for detail and work ethic, he'd be an asset in any field he chose to work.

And if that's not enough, the owner of 777 Roofing, Larry Andrews, and his consultant, Mike Coday, dropped by later in the day to make sure all my needs had been met.  Larry has put together quite the team and appears to have a well-oiled machine.  I highly recommend 777 Roofing for your roofing needs.  Thanks guys!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp75KFmgE&fid=0x0:0x8cfe972ca6669587"],"When":"2023-8-31"},{"Name":"Gilbert Rivera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwITHwhy_mWt1SUBfb1-WQ3su-XlqNFv0QY7G86YKjsfdyjdM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an unexpected leak in my master bedroom ceiling that left me frustrated and unsure where to turn. Thankfully, I called 777 Roofing, and they truly delivered. Josh Daugherty, their technician, made time to see us right away and was incredibly diligent, patient, and attentive throughout the entire process. He stayed in touch consistently, checking in to make sure everything was going smoothly.

Josh and his team quickly identified the issue and resolved it immediately. What impressed me even more was their proactive approach—they didn’t just fix the leak, they also helped prevent similar problems in other areas of my home. That kind of thoroughness and care is rare.

I highly recommend 777 Roofing to anyone dealing with roofing issues. And when you call, ask for Josh Daugherty—he’s the man! Thanks again for the outstanding service!","Images":null,"When":""}]
