Will contact them when I M ready for new roof.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"C Bridges","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7tR72hO7DSZF-cZT-NU6S5-R6wCkxtiZHVd4u8Prw5t5zBA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great job... I had a large project and they worked incredibly hard. A manger was on sight most of the time. I would definitely use them again. Don't get excited during the process they will get it cleaned up before they leave...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICr87uWIA&fid=0x0:0x990e20089aaff198"],"When":"2024-7-11"},{"Name":"gp52j","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLE399qcdaz4WrPeOnLBErWArG4yn4vLhnsbN7AdBTaJ_ar=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On 5/05/22 parts of Stillwater had golf ball to tennis ball sized hail. Our roof was damaged along with screens and guttering. I found out about Land roofing from a next door neighbor and called them to get an inspection done.
David Graham was easy to work with and provided us with a very detailed report and lots of pictures detailing our storm damage. When our insurance company decided they wanted their own inspection, David offered to be here and follow their inspector to offer any help he might need. This in my opinion is quality of service that is above expectations.
Once work commenced we were completely surprised at how professional and quick the job was performed!!! My entire old roof was completely removed and a complete new one installed in just ONE day in including cleanup! Our roof required 38 bundles of shingles so it was not just a tiny house. We also had them install new vents to help keep our attic cooler in the summertime.
Lastly but certainly not least their Administrative Assistant Michelle Maker was/is unbelievably fantastic in dealing with insurance companies. Ours has been extremely reticent to return phone calls and provide information. Michelle has handled them like the professional she most certainly is and we are very thankful for her services.
Land Enterprises Roofing is a wonderful company to do business with and one I am most certainly happy to give references for should anyone be looking for an honest, fair and quality professional roofing installation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICe7p-9Iw&fid=0x0:0x990e20089aaff198"],"When":"2022-9-14"},{"Name":"Deant70","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxOqXaiM7y6DbNnyxUjfc1Mm02HnnHJtrjsYPTTwIh0PfhgJSt=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Land Enterprises were very helpful getting insurance to cover a new roof, and Jerry et al. were good at getting every $$$ paid from insurance for their work.  I am happy with my roof, but whatever day work crew they found to install the roof left the siding looking worse than before where it meets the roof line in front and back.  I mentioned it twice to them, that and the standing water at one end of the new guttering, but was blown off once they got the final payment with which I included these photos. lesson learned, alas! normally I wouldn't bother with reviews online, but I'm reminded of it looking up at the house every time I'm outside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICa_aPnEg&fid=0x0:0x990e20089aaff198"],"When":"2021-8-7"},{"Name":"Scott M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIGYKOrNRPxN_QQwfcjCrUJycheF4dqPlIfeN8RDt8V_nLk9g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They were very responsive.  They confirmed my estimate appointment by email and let me know who would be coming to my home.  Taylor did a great job, provided a written estimate with pictures and the price seemed reasonable.  He was timely and professional.  A team showed up on the agreed date and completed the job.  I appreciate that they left my yard clean and you would never know they had been there.  Finding reliable people in small business is sometimes a challenge.  Land Enterprises Roofing is a keeper.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lindsey Prince","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5AghO76AYzCGsO6alkJMVUK466Uj5Y04aVLXTBITtVun9Dw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These people go above and beyond! I had a concern awhile after they installed the roof and they were so quick to help! Todd was so helpful and kind over the phone. He went out of his was to answer my questions and resolve any issues! The team that came to the house got everything squared away super quickly. To top it off, the roof is in great shape after two years of enduring hail, ice, earthquakes, and Oklahoma winds. Land Enterprises Roofing is the only company my family has trusted since their opening.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amy Levescy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuycdfXTYYmI90JJ99A5ppPwNbslitR1Z5IaPBJLbLc6y_8w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have been using Land Roofing for over 15 years for our rental properties and our homes. They are amazing! They are easy to work with, and their crews do a fantastic job. Best roofing company in Oklahoma!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pamela Thomas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0vY010NmADauPvV5kXHwG-cig_hOS4s3YDpjVKIDqHpIXpg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a wonderful company to work with! All of the staff were very professional, friendly, and personable! Anyone with whom I spoke was more than willing to answer all of my questions thoroughly and patiently. They did excellent work! They installed roof vents and soffits. There was an immediate difference in the temperature of my home. The upstairs was at least 30° hotter than the downstairs prior to the work being done. Now that the work is complete, the entire house is the same temperature. They completed the project so professionally and cleanly that there was no evidence of their presence, except the completed work. The vents and soffits look like they've been there the entire time. I give the highest recommendations for this company!","Images":null,"When":""}]
